# Logins exempt from the Contributor License Agreement gate, one glob per line.
# Read by scripts/ci/cla-gate.sh. Living on the default branch means every
# addition goes through a reviewed pull request. `*` and `?` are wildcards;
# brackets are literal.

# Bots author no copyrightable work of their own and cannot comment a
# signature, so every bot account is exempt. GitHub App accounts always carry
# the `[bot]` suffix, which makes this exact rather than a name guess.
*[bot]

# The Maintainer named in CLA.md - the party the agreement grants rights *to*,
# so there is nobody for him to sign with.
brandonocasey
